name: @pippit-bridge/opencode-plugin
description: OpenCode custom video tools and private Access Key enrollment for Pippit (小云雀)

scripts.prepack: npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/core && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/sdk && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/mcp-server && npm run build
scripts.pretest: npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/core && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/sdk && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/mcp-server && npm run build
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/core && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/sdk && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/mcp-server
